title: Auto-Mode Reliability Fixes
goal: Fix two critical auto-mode bugs: (1) agents respawning on already-completed features due to stale planSpec state, and (2) agents executing against stale main branches because worktrees aren't rebased before execution.

title: Agent Knowledge Hive — Chunked Retrieval & Semantic Memory
goal: Replace brute-force memory file injection with a chunked, searchable knowledge store (SQLite FTS5) upgradeable to local semantic embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 via @xenova/transformers), plus HyPE pre-computed query embeddings for zero-runtime-cost semantic retrieval. Eliminate the 375KB+ memory file injection problem, add cross-project knowledge sharing, memory deduplication/pruning, and document the full RAG philosophy as owned architecture decisions.

title: Agent Workflow Reliability
goal: Fix the 3 root-cause reliability bugs surfaced in the Knowledge Hive retro (dep gating, uncommitted changes, file contention), then modularize the 900-line KnowledgeStoreService monolith to prevent the same issues from recurring.

title: APF Agent Reliability — Learning Flywheel & Constraint Engineering
goal: Adopt the five highest-impact concepts from the Agentic Problem Frames whitepaper (arXiv:2602.19065) by wiring existing but disconnected infrastructure: connect FailureClassifier to EscalateProcessor, make agent constraints template-driven, build a verified trajectory store that populates the siblingReflections placeholder, and gate large/architectural plans through the existing antagonistic-review flow.

title: Automation Engine
goal: Replace protoMaker's 10 fragmented event/workflow/ceremony/maintenance systems with a unified, CRUD-managed Automation Engine built on LangGraph, the existing provider system, and OTel observability. Every operation — maintenance check, ceremony, scheduled job, Ava activation — becomes an Automation: a LangGraph flow with a trigger, a model assignment via phaseModels, and full OTel tracing through Langfuse and Grafana.

title: Bugs
goal: Persistent project for tracking all bug reports, investigations, and fixes.

title: Ceremony & Reflection Reliability
goal: Fix silent failures in the ceremony system so retros, standups, and milestone announcements reliably post to Discord; make ceremonies enabled by default; add observability so operators can tell whether a ceremony posted or was silently swallowed.

title: DeerFlow Adoption
goal: Port three high-value patterns from ByteDance's DeerFlow v2.0 into Automaker: session recovery guard for interrupted agent runs, progressive skill loading to reduce context bloat, and structured trajectory fact extraction to improve sibling reflection signal quality.

title: Design Studio — Native .pen Renderer & Editor
goal: Build a native designs panel that renders the designs/ directory as a file tree, opens .pen files as visual canvases, and provides editing capabilities — fully replacing pencil.dev in the workflow.

title: Git Workflow Reliability
goal: Eliminate silent git workflow failures so every agent-completed feature results in a committed, pushed, PR'd change — never stranded work in worktrees.

title: Grafana Observability Stack
goal: Deploy a complete observability pipeline (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki) on staging that provides system dashboards, AI agent cost tracking, and a closed-loop alert pipeline where deploy failures automatically create Linear bug reports and notify the team via Discord.

title: HITL UX + Signal Intent Routing
goal: Close the three critical gaps in the human-agent feedback loop: (1) signals classified by source rather than intent cause Linear comments to dead-end in the inbox instead of reaching the running agent; (2) deferred HITL forms have no re-trigger mechanism so users miss pending requests; (3) ESCALATE state notifies passively but provides no structured resolution path, leaving blocked features silent.

title: Infrastructure: Modularize MCP server for social + workspace tools
Knowledge Pipeline Completion + GTM Content Track
goal: Complete knowledge pipeline integration (startup init, PLAN-stage RAG, Langfuse tracing, auto-mode context fidelity) and introduce a first-class GTM content track where content features flow through the same BACKLOG→IN_PROGRESS→REVIEW→DONE pipeline as engineering features, executed by Jon/Cindi agents via ContentFlowService.

title: Lead Engineer Hardening
goal: Harden the Lead Engineer state machine with crash recovery coordination, structured failure intelligence, and plan quality gates — making the autonomous pipeline self-healing and resilient to server restarts.

title: Production CI/CD Reliability Hardening
goal: Close the three operational reliability gaps between staging and production CI/CD: add agent drain before production deploys, make production smoke tests fatal with proper rollback gating, and validate GH_PAT presence before auto-release to prevent silent Electron build failures.

title: Signal-Aware HITL & Pipeline Integrity
goal: Implement signal-aware HITL routing so that every gate hold, approval request, and escalation responds through the channel the signal originated from (Linear comment → Linear reply, Discord → Discord reaction, GitHub → issue comment, UI/MCP → UI dialog). Simultaneously fix all 11 audit findings in the signal-to-production pipeline to ensure correctness, integrity, and no silent failures.

title: Signal Platform — Discord & Integrations Tab
goal: Make the integrations settings tab the control center for all incoming signal sources. Wire Discord as a live background signal source with per-channel configuration, and add a signal inbox panel for visibility into what's been received and acted on.

title: User Profile & Persona Prompt Management
goal: Add a UserProfile to global settings so agent persona prompts pull user/brand context dynamically, and expose persona system prompts as editable overrides in the Settings UI — enabling any user or organization to customize Automaker without touching source code.

title: QA Smoke Test Project
goal: Temporary project created during Ava chat tools smoke test. Safe to delete after confirming create_project_plan tool is functional.

title: Projects page improvements
goal: Improve the mobile experience for the project views. pair down the tabs for the project, there is some overlap that I feel can be cleaned up. use the features tab as the design direction, but organize it better to track the features in relation to the epics. then we should be able to lose the milestones tab. Documents and links should only show if any are present, but should share a tab. then we should just have links and add > actions menu to add links and documents.

title: QA Smoke Test Project
goal: Temporary project created during Ava chat tools smoke test. Safe to delete after confirming create_project_plan tool is functional.

title: Automation Control Plane Consolidation
goal: Consolidate the duplicate Maintenance and Automations UIs into a single Automations control plane by achieving feature parity in AutomationsSection, deleting the MaintenanceSection, and removing the orphaned scheduler routes.

title: Automations Upgrade
goal: Promote the Automations section from a simple CRUD panel into the single control plane for all scheduled work — built-in maintenance tasks, user automations, and scheduler health. Every operator action (enable/disable, reschedule, view metrics, triage failures) happens in one place without needing MCP access.

title: Ava Chat Context Window Management
goal: Implement a 3-layer context management strategy for the Ava chat to prevent context window exhaustion. Layer 1: Tool result compaction (truncate/summarize large tool results before they enter conversation). Layer 2: Claude API native context_management with tool result clearing. Layer 3: Server-side compaction as safety net.

title: Distributed Product Lifecycle Platform
goal: Transform protoLabs from a single-instance task runner into a distributed product creation platform — from idea to production. CRDT-synced operational state (features, projects, calendar, todos, settings) across multiple Automaker instances on Tailscale VPN, with an agentic Stage-Gate lifecycle (8 automated gates), cross-instance work-stealing, a private Ava channel for self-organizing coordination, DORA metrics as auto-regulation control signals, and outcome-driven features. Notes sync via git. The full lifecycle flywheel: signals > gates > execution > promotion > reflection > learning > better signals.

title: E2E Pipeline Hardening
goal: Fix the 3 known durability and enforcement gaps in the idea-to-production pipeline: completion event dedup loses state on restart causing double-ceremonies, ceremony dedup loses state on restart causing double-retros, and no CI enforcement preventing arbitrary branches from targeting staging.

title: Frontend Tech Debt Remediation
goal: Eliminate the remaining frontend tech debt: decompose the monolithic terminal panel, reach full Storybook coverage with Chromatic CI, extract organisms to the shared UI package, and establish the a11y linting baseline.

title: Lifecycle Traceability & Paper Trail
goal: Create a fully connected, auditable lifecycle system where every project, feature, ceremony, and agent execution produces a permanent, traceable paper trail. Fix the broken milestone cascade, introduce event persistence, prevent archival data loss, and establish TDD coverage for the entire lifecycle pipeline.

title: macOS System Tray Icon
goal: Add a persistent macOS system tray icon to the Electron app so Ava stays accessible in the menubar when the main window is closed, with a context menu for quick actions and a live status indicator showing running agent count.

title: Maintenance System Overhaul
goal: Modernize and standardize the maintenance system by fixing integration branch awareness, removing temporary stop-gaps, establishing proper configuration patterns, and creating a unified maintenance framework that scales with the team's workflow.

title: Project Lifecycle Hub
goal: Complete the project lifecycle end-to-end: fix the milestoneSlug cascade bug so milestone/project completion events fire correctly, persist all project artifacts (ceremony reports, changelogs, escalations) on the project, add per-project Discord webhook routing, build a timeline API, and surface everything on a unified project page hub. TDD throughout.

title: Project Manager Ava
goal: Promote the project lifecycle system from disconnected primitives into a unified PM experience: per-project PM agents that live for the lifetime of a project, accessible via chat, event-driven, managing ceremonies through a persistent state machine, and initiation via natural Ava conversation. Simultaneously overhaul the project detail UI for mobile usability by consolidating overlapping tabs and organizing features under epics.

title: SDK Deep Integration
goal: Wire the full Claude Agent SDK surface — native hooks, per-surface custom MCP servers, and a configurable canUseTool trust model — through the entire agent execution stack. Default is full trust (bypassPermissions). Users opt into gated review mode.

title: Server Pipeline Refactor
goal: Consolidate the overlapping auto-mode and Lead Engineer control planes into a clean Scheduler + Feature Pipeline architecture, eliminate the broadcast event storm, and make the system ready for Ava chat as the primary operator interface.

title: SetupLab: Published Onboarding Tool
goal: Refine the existing setuplab pipeline into a polished, published onboarding tool that any developer can run against their repo to get set up with protoLabs Studio. Generates proto.config.yaml, initializes .automaker/, creates tutorial content, and produces an HTML report — all from pure heuristics, no API key required.

title: Streaming Text Rendering
goal: Overhaul the Ava chat surface streaming render pipeline: fix plugin array remount bug, add streaming-safe markdown sanitization, gate syntax highlighting behind isComplete, implement scroll lock with useLayoutEffect, add CSS streaming cursor, and add segment memoization for long messages.

title: test
goal: testing

title: Rabbit Hole — Self-Hosted Deep Research Platform
goal: Make rabbit-hole.io fully functional as a self-hosted deep research platform: remove broken auth/collab dependencies, wire the agent-to-canvas pipeline, expand search providers, and parallelize the research agent.
